issue: Rows with city outside known King County localities
why_it_matters: Can mislead city filters and jurisdiction reporting.
suggested_action: Canonicalize to `Outside King County` and keep raw city in audit field.

why_it_matters: Signals new locality tokens not covered by mapping; breaks grouping consistency.
suggested_action: Add to mapping dictionary or route to Outside bucket after manual review.

issue: Rows whose coordinates are outside King County bbox
why_it_matters: Potential non-county records or wrong geocode values.
suggested_action: Flag for exclusion from county-facing KPI and map layer.

why_it_matters: Same city appears under multiple styles; hurts search and dedup.
suggested_action: Enforce canonical uppercase in storage + title case in UI.

why_it_matters: Indicates locality ambiguity or input errors around same zip.
suggested_action: Apply zip-majority repair with thresholds + exception list.

why_it_matters: Cannot reliably build event-level lineage and joins.
suggested_action: Create deterministic fallback inspection key and keep missing flag.

why_it_matters: Weakens dedup and row-level traceability for violations.
suggested_action: Use composite hashed surrogate key for violation rows.

why_it_matters: Breaks time-based trend analysis and monthly rollups.
suggested_action: Route invalid dates to quarantine table and fill only if recoverable.

why_it_matters: Rows may represent non-violation inspections; raw null must be interpreted, not silently dropped.
Official grade absence drives confusion when dashboard still computes a rating.
suggested_action: Display explicit reason code for missing grade and keep dashboard-calculated rating separately.

why_it_matters: Truncated text reduces public understanding and remediation quality.
suggested_action: Rehydrate from violation code dictionary and add standard description template.

why_it_matters: May be valid in special contexts but should be clearly tagged.
suggested_action: Whitelist allowed inspection types; flag others for review.

issue: Latest businesses where dashboard rating != official published grade (all)
why_it_matters: Creates trust gap between county website and dashboard outputs.
suggested_action: Publish a mismatch panel with reason buckets (official missing vs threshold difference).

issue: Latest businesses with true mismatch excluding rating-not-available on either side
why_it_matters: These are direct rule/output disagreements that need policy or data correction.
suggested_action: Review per pattern and confirm county rule implementation + source data completeness.
